overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night during light rain. The character travels along a highway sidewalk past graffiti-covered walls, continues through a neon-lit commercial district featuring the Cirkus billboard, and turns into a covered pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway sidewalk with graffiti wall and overhead pass

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing passes close to the camera on the right, temporarily blocking part of the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet highway sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered concrete wall

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket walking toward the camera, passing by closely

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in graffiti including 'PADRE' and 'SAFE' text
metal truss bridge structure spanning the highway ahead
tall street lamps illuminating the highway and sidewalk
concrete median barrier separating highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow highway sidewalk at night, with a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the right and a multi-lane road on the left. Overhead, a metal highway overpass spans the road ahead. Streetlights cast artificial illumination on the wet pavement as pedestrians occasionally pass by in the opposing direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: exiting the highway graffiti wall section into the commercial district with bright neon signage
entering the intensely lit area dominated by the large blue Cirkus billboard and surrounding neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the vibrant commercial district toward the large illuminated Cirkus billboard

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking in the same direction ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: building facade with distinctive yellow trim and metal security shutters
large illuminated blue billboard displaying 'CIRKUS' in bold red letters
multiple glowing advertisement screens on the building facade
colorful neon signage on buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a bustling commercial district bathed in neon light. The character walks toward the prominent blue Cirkus billboard while passing by a yellow-trimmed building covered in digital advertisements. The sidewalk widens and pedestrian traffic increases as vehicles move along the multi-lane street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under commercial building

events.description: turning right into the covered pedestrian walkway away from the main street

agents.ego_description: turning right into a covered pedestrian walkway, moving away from the main street traffic

entered.detail: covered pedestrian passage under the building overhang providing shelter from rain
closed metal security grates with yellow frames on the storefronts
floating blue holographic figure visible in the distance down the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a covered pedestrian walkway, leaving the busy street behind. The environment becomes more sheltered and dimly lit, with metal security shutters lining the right side and the yellow-trimmed building now on the left. A holographic advertisement floats in the distance as the character continues under the building overhang.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty highway perimeter into the neon-drenched heart of a commercial district before retreating into a sheltered walkway. It begins on a narrow sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered concrete wall, moving under a metal highway overpass where streetlights reflect off the wet pavement. As the character advances, the environment opens into a bustling urban center bathed in artificial light, passing yellow-trimmed buildings and digital advertisements toward a prominent blue Cirkus billboard. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, leaving the busy street and traffic behind to enter a dimly lit, covered pedestrian walkway. Finally, the surroundings become more enclosed, moving past metal security shutters and under a building overhang toward a floating holographic advertisement in the distance.
